changeSet.author: tafere
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_items (category_id, name, name_am, sort_order, enabled, max_quantity, schedulable, slot_interval_mins, capacity, confirm_only) SELECT rc.id, 'Do Not Disturb', 'አትረብሽ', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), 0) + 1 FROM request_items ri2 WHERE ri2.category_id = rc.id), true, 1, false, 30, 15, true FROM request_categories rc WHERE rc.name = 'Housekeeping' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM request_items ri WHERE ri.category_id = rc.id AND ri.name = 'Do Not Disturb' );
